svg.text: Five elements · environment-system interface · contour I/O path

g.text: substrate · operating logic · not at same level as the other four
Three reasons a signal produces no response:
1. Gate blocked it — access failure (intervention: reconfigure Gate)
2. Below Threshold — strength failure (intervention: amplify Signal or lower Threshold)
(intervention: Code rewrite — Receiver can't parse it at all)
